name: safe_newsletter_kaggle
notes: Sanitized real-world newsletter pattern with strong branding and footer trust markers.
subject: Host Your Own Hackathon on Kaggle Now!
body: Hi Daniel Kapolobwe, Community Hackathons are now available to all Kaggle users at no cost. Learn more at https://www.kaggle.com/. You can unsubscribe or update your preferences on your profile page.

name: safe_newsletter_github_digest
notes: Branded product digest with preferences and unsubscribe language.
subject: Your weekly GitHub activity summary
body: Here is your weekly summary of pull requests, issues, and repository activity. Review your notifications at https://github.com/notifications and update your email preferences anytime.

name: safe_marketing_linkedin_digest
notes: Marketing/community digest from a professional network.
subject: Top posts and jobs you may have missed
body: Catch up on new posts, suggested jobs, and people in your network. View in browser or update your preferences at https://www.linkedin.com/.

name: transaction_receipt_store
notes: Normal ecommerce receipt with aligned domain and PDF receipt.
subject: Your order receipt from Example Store
body: Thank you for your order. View your receipt at https://example-store.com/orders/12345 or manage your preferences in your account.

name: transaction_invoice_saas
notes: Software billing invoice with a cautious but safe pattern.
subject: Invoice INV-1048 for your workspace subscription
body: Your monthly invoice is ready. Download the PDF invoice from https://workspace-tools.com/billing/invoices and contact support if you have questions.

name: security_notice_github
subject: Security alert: new sign-in to your account
body: We noticed a new sign-in to your GitHub account. If this was not you, review your recent security activity at https://github.com/settings/security-log.

name: security_notice_microsoft
notes: Legitimate account security email that contains security language but aligned domains.
subject: Microsoft account security code
body: Use this security code to complete your sign-in. If you did not request this, review your account security activity at https://account.microsoft.com/security.

name: borderline_password_reset
notes: Suspicious but not extreme password reset email with mixed signals.
subject: Reset your project dashboard password
body: We received a password reset request. If this was you, continue at https://project-desk-mail.com/reset. If this was not you, you can ignore this message.

name: borderline_security_notice_mismatch
notes: Security-themed message with sender and link mismatch that should stay suspicious.
subject: Security alert: unusual login noticed
body: We noticed a new login to your account. If this was not you, review activity now at https://github-notice.com/security.

name: phishing_shortener
notes: Classic urgent credential lure using a shortener.
subject: Urgent: Verify your payroll account
body: Your account has been suspended. Click here immediately to confirm your identity and reset your password: http://bit.ly/payroll-reset

name: phishing_invoice_mismatch
notes: Invoice lure with mismatched headers, IP-based URL, and dangerous attachment name.
subject: Invoice attached for your review
body: Please review the attached invoice and confirm payment today. Sign in now at http://198.51.100.23/login to avoid delays.

name: phishing_bank_clone
notes: Brand impersonation with lookalike domain and account-verification language.
subject: Bank alert: account verification required
body: Suspicious activity was detected on your account. Verify now at https://bankofamerica-login.net/secure to restore access.

name: phishing_redirect_link
notes: URL includes redirect parameter and mismatched return path.
subject: Action required: update billing information
body: Update billing now to avoid service interruption: https://cloud-secure-notice.com/go?redirect=https://pay-update.example/login

name: safe_transaction_support_reply
notes: Customer support follow-up with a normal PDF attachment and aligned headers.
subject: Support follow-up for ticket #8421
body: We have resolved your ticket and attached the service report. You can review the ticket history at https://hosting-example.com/support/tickets/8421.

name: safe_event_update
notes: Community event update with marketing cues but not much risk language.
subject: Reminder: your event starts tomorrow
body: Your registered event starts tomorrow. View details at https://communityhub.org/events/launch-day or update your preferences from your profile page.
